plugins.name: code-handoff
plugins.description: Packages the current conversation into a handoff document for a fresh coding agent session.

plugins.name: copy-editor
plugins.description: Takes an editorial pass on existing prose to improve clarity and flow while preserving the author's voice.

plugins.name: planning-photoshoots
plugins.description: A conversational photography companion that recommends gear loadouts, styles, and practical tips for a shoot based on goals, location, weather, and owned equipment.
